bggs-reception.instruction: Take the internal elevator to Level 1 Reception.

bggs-undercroft.instruction: Take the elevator down to the Undercroft Car Park.

bggs-year5.instruction: Take the main stairs up to the Year 5 Hub on Level 2.

bggs-podium.instruction: Exit through the west doors to the Podium Planting Area.

bggs-reception.instruction: Take the main stairs down to Reception.

bggs-year6.instruction: Take the elevator up one floor to the Year 6 Hub.

bggs-year5.instruction: Take the elevator down one floor to the Year 5 Hub.

bggs-reception.instruction: Enter the main building via the west doors to Reception.
